title: 10 best herbal creams for depression
description: Peppermint creams helps with depression because of its calming and uplifting properties. The menthol in peppermint can help to reduce anxiety and stress, which are common symptoms of depression. Additionally, the aroma of peppermint has been shown to increase serotonin levels, a neurotransmitter that regulates mood.
